prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为10810→11739→12049→11188→11248，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025年基准位次约11248名，近两年在11188–11248区间窄幅波动，走势趋于平稳；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为13人，2026年计划仍为13人，连续六年保持不变，无扩招或缩招，招生规模对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第59位→2022年第63位→2023年第63位→2024年第66位→2025年第72位→2026年第65位，近年排名先降后升，2026年回升至第65位，对考生吸引力有所增强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及拟录取研究生不当言论事件），但影响范围有限；抖音热度为较热（总排名第57位），短视频平台曝光度中等；2021–2025年均无投档线断档或暴跌记录，招生稳定性较好；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，共5个A类学科；与招生专业中电子科学与技术（实验班）、人工智能（实验班）、电子信息工程等高度关联，对相关专业报考有正向支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业以电子信息类、人工智能、数学类为主，对应专业大类中电子信息/通信为高热推荐（2024年），计算机类为推荐，社会热度较高；江苏省2026年物理类考生约37.98万人（按2025年72.9%占比估算），较2025年26.06万人增长约45.7%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧；北京工业大学位于北京市，属直辖市高校，在江苏省招生计划仅13人且连续六年不变，招生规模极小，属于外省招生名额有限的典型情况。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅波动、招生计划连续六年持平、软科排名回升、热门专业吸引力较强以及江苏省物理类考生规模大幅增长（+45.7%）等因素，竞争加剧是主要推动力，预计2026年最低位次在2025年11248名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约11368名，区间10868–11868名。

- 电子科学与技术（实验班）
- 人工智能（实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 电子信息工程
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10868–11868名内，建议以二档专业（电子信息工程、数学类）为主攻方向，一档专业（电子科学与技术实验班、人工智能实验班）作为冲刺，三档工业设计作为保底。位次优于区间下限（10868名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 10810 → 11739 → 12049 → 11188 → 11248, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11248, with narrow fluctuations between 11188 and 11248 in the past two years, indicating a stable trend; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Province for Physics Category was 13 students from 2021 to 2025, and remains 13 students for 2026, unchanged for six consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, and the enrollment scale has no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Rankings were 59th in 2021 → 63rd in 2022 → 63rd in 2023 → 66th in 2024 → 72nd in 2025 → 65th in 2026, with rankings first declining then rising, returning to 65th in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (involving an incident of inappropriate remarks by proposed graduate students), but the impact is limited; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (57th overall), with moderate exposure on short video platforms; from 2021 to 2025, there were no records of cutoff line breaks or sharp drops, indicating good enrollment stability; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering was rated A, and Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A-, totaling 5 A-class disciplines; these are highly related to the enrollment majors such as Electronic Science and Technology (Experimental Class), Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class), and Electronic Information Engineering, providing positive support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors are mainly in Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, and Mathematics; among the corresponding major categories, Electronic Information/Communication is a high-heat recommendation (2024), Computer Science is recommended, with high social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province for 2026 is approximately 379,800 (estimated based on 72.9% of 2025's total), an increase of about 45.7% compared to 260,600 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in candidate numbers and intensified competition; Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, a municipality directly under the central government, with only 13 enrollment slots in Jiangsu Province, unchanged for six consecutive years, representing a very small enrollment scale, typical of limited out-of-province enrollment quotas.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as narrow fluctuations in historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for six consecutive years, recovery in Soft Science rankings, strong appeal of popular majors, and a significant increase (45.7%) in the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province, intensified competition is the main driving force; it is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will slightly decline from the 2025 ranking of 11248; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11368, with a range of 10868 to 11868.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Science and Technology (Experimental Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Industrial Design.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10868 to 11868, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Engineering, Mathematics), use Tier 1 majors (Electronic Science and Technology Experimental Class, Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class) as a stretch, and Tier 3 Industrial Design as a safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 10868), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
